THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARINA FOCACCIA CUCINA ITALIANA $1,319.46 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,349.46, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, J.T. KOSTELINI, IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CNACEL JUDGMENT: THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER:[X] THE REQUEST TO CORRECT A CLERICAL ERROR IN THE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NAMED DEFENDANT TO BE CHANGED FROM FARINA FOCACCIO CULINA ITALIANA TO FARINA FOCACCIA CUCINA ITALIANA
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR TRIMARK ERF, INC ASSIGNED TO THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.
